description:
Xposed module showing download progress around the camera cutout

Xposed module that renders download progress as an animated ring around the camera cutout.

System download notifications are intercepted and visualized with customizable colors, animations, and haptic feedback. Features include an active download counter, battery saver-aware rendering, per-rotation (0°/90°/180°/270°) calibration for text and badge offsets, and optional vertical filename text in landscape.

Requires Android 9+, LSPosed, and a Pixel/AOSP-based ROM (other ROMs may not work as expected).
